title: CAP Theorem & PACELC
description: Deconstruct the CAP Theorem and its implications for distributed system design. Explain the PACELC theorem to understand the trade-offs between latency and consistency during normal operations versus network partitions.
objectives: Deconstruct the CAP Theorem and its implications for distributed system design.
Explain the PACELC theorem to understand the trade-offs between latency and consistency during normal operations versus network partitions.
